text:
Created attachment 186515
Update cacti to 1.1.24

Update cacti to 1.1.24.
This is a bugfix release so no merge-quarterly required.

Committer: please ignore portlint warnings about gettext as cacti has internal gettext support.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.1 i386/amd64 located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.24/
